intro.label: Welcome
intro.text: Nestled on the enchanting island of Astipalea, Blue View Suites offers an unforgettable escape where traditional Greek beauty meets modern luxury.

features.label: Experience
features.title: Why Choose Us
features.seaDesc: Wake up to breathtaking panoramic views of the deep blue Aegean Sea
features.locationDesc: Steps away from Astipalea's charming village and pristine beaches
features.comfortDesc: Luxurious amenities blended with traditional Cycladic architecture

location.label: Location
location.title: Find Us in Astipalea
location.description: Located on the enchanting island of Astipalea in the Dodecanese, our suites sit perched above the Aegean with unobstructed views of the crystal-clear waters. Just minutes from the iconic Chora and the island's best beaches.
location.distances: 5 min from Chora • 10 min from port • 5 min from beach

cta.label: Your escape awaits
cta.title: Where the Aegean meets the sky

booking.title: Book Your Stay
booking.successMessage: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

about.title: About Blue View Suites
about.label: Our Story
about.description: Nestled on the enchanting island of Astipalea, Blue View Suites offers an unforgettable escape where traditional Greek beauty meets modern luxury.
about.islandDesc: Known as the 'Butterfly of the Aegean', Astipalea is a hidden gem combining Cycladic charm with Dodecanese warmth.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.description: Whether you have a question about our suites, need help planning your stay, or want to make a reservation, our team is here to help.
